title: Swimming Class 游泳课
scene: Amy和Lily在游泳池上游泳课，学习自由泳。

lines.en: Lily, are you coming to swimming class today?
Yes! I am a little nervous though.
Do not worry. The water is not deep here.
Can you teach me how to float?
Sure. Lie on your back and relax your body.
lines.zh: 当然。仰面躺下，放松身体。

lines.en: Like this? Oh, I am floating!
lines.zh: 像这样吗？噢，我飘起来了！

lines.en: Great! Now move your arms like this.
lines.zh: 太好了！现在像我这样划手臂。

lines.en: It is hard, but I will keep trying.
You are doing well. Let us swim to the other side.
lines.zh: 你做得很好。我们游到对面去吧。
